name: Sambal Goreng Telur (Spiced Eggs)
recipeIngredient: 5 Eggs, hard-boiled and sliced into halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced eggs in a serving dish.
2. In a separate pan, heat peanut oil over medium heat.
3. Saute onion and garlic until fragrant.
4. Add candlenut, Laos, Sambal Oelek, and salt. Stir to combine.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the spices are well incorporated.
6. Add brown sugar and salam leaf. Stir to mix.
7. Pour in coconut milk and bring mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
9. Pour the sauce over the hard-boiled eggs and serve.
